message:
fix(extensions): filter non-extension sibling files during flat directory discovery

When discovering sibling extension entries in a flat directory (e.g.,
doom-like/index.ts alongside doom-like/engine.ts), every .ts sibling
was treated as an extension entry point, causing helper/utility modules
to be incorrectly loaded as extensions.

- Add is_likely_flat_extension_entry() heuristic checking for
  export default function, export default async function, or
  registerCommand()/registerTool()/etc. call patterns
- discover_sibling_extension_entries() now skips files that don't
  pass this heuristic
- Update existing test to use export default function signatures
- Add discover_related_extension_entries_ignores_flat_helper_siblings
  test proving helper files are excluded

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
